plan_seeds.recommended_approach_summary: Static search proves src/main/index.ts:54 is unreachable — zero ipcRenderer/send/invoke references exist across src/preload and src/renderer (the value is classified unclassified, with no payload-shape consumer). This is deletion of unreachable code, not new code, so no canonical-pattern reuse applies.
plan_seeds.layer_justification: The symptom is one unreachable statement in the main-process entry file with no callers, no value-flow consumers, and no cross-layer dependents (verified: 0 ipcRenderer references project-wide). The change is local to src/main/index.ts; no other layer is involved.
